item.title: au revoir mes amis
item.description:
For those of you leaving, I'll miss you. Mainly because I'm a terrible shot. Love to most of you, solidarity with most of you as well. Also, before the blackout, my birthday is on the 3rd, and Frank's 5-month birthday is on the 4th. It's also his 2-month gotcha anniversary. Here's Frank's wishlist. There might be a couple of things on there for dad. hah. https://www.amazon.com/registries/gl/guest-view/2K9H2SKWY9SGB
If you made it down here, tiny octopus is over on Bluesky and so is Frank. tiny-octopus.bsky.social FrankTheKitten.bsky.social
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: A moderately sized DK dump of stolen memes for these trying times 1852.
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Fun stuff. Godspeed to everyone leaving. I’m not. Imgur is home for better or worse. Shall go down with the ship if necessary. Not joining anyone’s server, have searched for decent alternative for years to no avail. Site and app have always been buggy. Not pleased with medialab but believe it or not, while moderation still wildly inconsistent and frustrating, way better and more relaxed than it was year or two ago. Feel few in as good a position as I to make such an assessment. Keep up the lewd and weird shitposting, has been missing from community for years. Bring back rewarding users that post content you dig. Do have a discord account if you leave and get desperate for memes, might be able to assist. Smooches.
item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I remember the imgur of old and it wasnn't that long ago when it was a lot more fun.
item.description: Hey, Business Daddy. I have a couple questions: If every imgurian leaves and never comes back, what will that say about your business daddy model? What will it say about the good ol' sell-out nature of corporate, capitalist greed? Do you remember what imgur was like before you bought it from the Schaafs? I do. I don't know if you were able to turn a profit with all the ads, but I never clicked on a single one of them and I don't know anyone who did. It was a slow migration. Most of the coolest imgurians like razor1000, kylecorn, sarah...I could keep naming names...one by one they decided it wasn't quite fun enough anymore. I'm still here because...well reddit sucks...FB sucks MUCH worse. Like nasty slurping noises while it sucks. I pray to God imgcat.io becomes exactly what imgur used to be. A fun place to kick back and commune with people over memes, cute pets, personal stories, life hacks, food porn. We just aren't seeing as much of that stuff here anymore. So many people have left. I'm not leaving yet, though. There are still good people here and they're why I still like it.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: All I've ever wanted was my dad's approval. All I got was business daddy.
item.description: ┌∩┐(ಠ_ಠ)┌∩┐ #bottomshelfmemes #memes #fybd #fubd September 1st. The day "Imgur goes dark" and the day before I log out for good. We spiked their traffic with the rebellion. Now time to crash it. We have to remind them it's us, their "numbers" that impress their investors. Without imgurians what's imgur? Another joke in my life. That's what. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Love playing BL3 on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

You can support us here : https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-us-keep-an-internet-cafe-in-yemen-running Watch our journey so far https://youtu.be/HccybX0kNEs Btc bc1qx2e2c47anz258nsdu3aj5u0fxg3vkkxc7wz5e8

item.title: Scum bag millionaire from Poland steals a hat intended for a child at the U.S. Open
item.description:
Polish Millionaire Outed as Alleged U.S. Open Hat Thief; CEO's Company Bombarded With Negative Reviews
Szczerek's paving company has been bombarded with negative reviews on job search sites in Poland following the incident. Once Majchrzak saw the video himself, he took to Instagram seeking help to get in touch with the young fan. "After the match, I didn’t realize that my cap didn’t get to the boy," he wrote. "Could you help me find the kid from my match? If it’s you (or your parents see this), please send me a DM." By Saturday, Majchrzak met up with the young fan and shared a photo with him on his Instagram story. The boy not only got a hat, but received some other goodies and signed merchandise from the tennis player. Source: https://www.outkick.com/sports/us-open-tennis-hat-snatcher-identified-millionaire-ceo-kamil-majchrzak-reunites-fan
item.dc:creator: thedoci

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: Panko’s done a lot of time. I think it’s time to expand his jail. Bought more mesh to try expand out the area for him. Considering getting a second doggy door for him as well. His current path to get to the grass is a little long so I think he sometimes struggles at night. We leave the laundry light on at night but I’m looking into getting some pathway lights and making it a bit shorter. As he’s in his golden years I just want to make things as easy for him as much I can.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Cause of Death
item.description: Ever fallen in love with a show or a comic, only to find out it got canceled because not enough people supported it? We don’t want that to happen here. The truth is, creating these comics is a labor of love, but love alone doesn’t pay the bills. Without financial support, even the things you cherish can fade away. By joining our Patreon, you’re not just getting great perks – you’re keeping this comic alive. If you love what we do, help us make sure it doesn’t disappear. Your support means everything. PS: https://www.patreon.com/join/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @KikiArtsNCrafts does these amazingly detailed and beautiful embroideries. Amazing work and a nice person!
27 Man Tax: Nick Zano
“Believe nothing, no matter where you read it, or who said it, no matter if I have said it, unless it agrees with your own reason and your own common sense.” - Gautama Buddha I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: JarJarDrinks

item.title: Bambi rescue
item.description:
I stumbled across this fawn while walking in the river. At first I thought it was dead, but I saw that it was breathing, so I moved it away from the bank.
After I moved the baby away from the river, she tried to flop towards the water again, so decided to take her to a park ranger, so she wouldn’t drown.
It was extremely hot, and she was obviously weak and confused
I carried her 2 miles to get to a park ranger, and waited in his truck while he checked to see if he could take her to a rescue.
She was exhausted but she made it! I was updated later and they were able to hydrate her and reunite her with her mom. They took her to the spot that I found her; I was tracking my hike and gave them the map. When they checked that area a little while later, they saw her walking around with her mom. I also returned to that area two days later and saw a mom and baby nearby, but I’m not sure if it was them. This entire thing may have been ok without my intervention; mom might have come back and encouraged her out of the river soon after I found her, but I’m glad I did what I did. It also gave me a once in a lifetime experience: I got to hold and carry a baby deer. They are so lightweight! Her dangly little stick legs were absolutely precious. It felt incredible to feel her rest her little head against me.
item.dc:creator: PicksOreItDidntHappen

item.title: Just a BIG ol dumperooonie

item.title: Jasmne's LinkedIn headshots
item.description:
Jasmne wanted to visit me while I was doing my potty time. She got into the bathtub and I couldn't help but take some pictures of her.
This is definitely her "I am the CEO" pose.
Yearbook picture!
From afar!
Getting her good side! ;) #Jasmne Also, make sure to join us tomorrow for the Jasmne's Got'cha Day Fundraiser for the Humane Society at 4 PM Central Time! We also spun up our own wholesome and safe for work Discord! https://discord.gg/pHH9n5fP
